failures.name: Basic service request
failures.summary: The agent captured the necessary details and confirmed them but did not schedule a callback.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to schedule a callback despite capturing all required information.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my AC isn't cooling.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Is your system completely not working at all right now?
Yes, it's not cooling at all.
Are you noticing anything like a burning smell, gas smell, or water leaking?
No, I don't smell anything unusual and there's no water leaking.
Great, thanks for that. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's John Smith.
Perfect, got it. What's the best callback number for you, John?
My number is 555-234-5678.
Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, that's 555-234-5678, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, can I have the service address where the AC is located?
It's 123 Main St, Dallas TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. 

Just to confirm, I have John Smith, callback number 555-234-5678, and the service address is 123 Main St, Dallas TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that all sounds right.
Perfect — I've noted that down. Our team will contact you as soon as possible to confirm if we can assist you. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Emergency - no heat in winter
failures.summary: The agent failed to offer a live transfer despite recognizing the urgency of the situation.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not initiate a transfer to urgent help or offer to transfer the caller.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I have no heat in my house and it’s freezing outside. I need help urgently.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Is your system completely not working at all right now?
Yes, it's completely off. My parents are elderly, and it’s really cold.
Are you noticing anything like a burning smell, gas smell, or water leaking?
No burning or gas smells. No leaks either, just no heat at all.
Thank you for that information. Let me get your name and callback number first. What’s your full name?
My name is Mike Johnson.
Great, thanks for that, Mike. What’s the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. That's 555-111-2222, correct?
Yes, that’s correct.
Thank you! Now, can I have the service address where you need assistance?
Sure, it's 456 Oak Ave, Dallas, TX.
We'll need a street address so our technician knows where to come — do you have a physical address for us?
Yes, it's 456 Oak Ave, Dallas, TX.
Just to confirm, I have Mike Johnson, callback number 555-111-2222, service address 456 Oak Ave, Dallas, TX, and you need help with no heat. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct. Thank you.
Perfect — I'm flagging this as urgent. Someone from our team will be in touch shortly to assist you. Please stay safe! [END CALL]

failures.name: Quote request
failures.summary: The agent did not route the call to the install/quote path as required.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to initiate a transfer or schedule a callback for a quote request.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I'm looking for a quote for a new AC unit installation.
I'd be happy to help with that! Can you please tell me your full name?
Sure, it's Sam Wilson.
Great, thanks for that, Sam! What is the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at 555-333-4444.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-333-4444, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address for the installation?
Of course, it's 789 Pine Rd, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. 

Just to confirm, I have Sam Wilson, callback number 555-333-4444, and the service address is 789 Pine Rd, Dallas, TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've noted that down. Our team will reach out to confirm whether we can assist you with the installation. Thank you, Sam! Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Maintenance request
failures.summary: The agent did not transfer the caller or confirm the maintenance request properly.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to initiate a transfer or confirm the scheduling of the maintenance request.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’d like to schedule annual AC maintenance before summer.
Great! I can help with that. May I have your full name, please?
It's Sarah Davis.
Perfect, thanks Sarah! What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-222-1111.
Great, thanks for that! Can you please provide the service address?
Sure, it's 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. 

Just to confirm, I have Sarah Davis, callback number 555-222-1111, and the service address is 987 Cedar Blvd, Dallas, TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct.
Perfect — I've noted your request. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm if we can assist you. Have a great day, Sarah! [END CALL]
